text:
In today’s world, sustainability is no longer an afterthought—it’s a necessity. The PHL Frontier Terminal is a shining example of how airports can embrace eco-friendly practices without compromising on functionality or comfort. The terminal’s design incorporates a range of sustainable features, including energy-efficient lighting, water-saving fixtures, and a robust recycling program. Solar panels and other renewable energy sources help reduce the terminal’s carbon footprint, while green spaces and natural lighting create a welcoming environment for passengers. VISIT :
https://airportsterminalhub.com/airlines/frontier-airlines/frontier-airlines-philadelphia-international-airport-phl-terminal/
